data.title: DOJ seizes $200k in crypto tied to Hamas terrorists
data.description:
DOJ seizes $201K in crypto tied to Hamas, disrupting a $1. 5M terror financing network traced to wallets across Turkey and beyond.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/doj-seizes-200k-in-crypto-tied-to-hamas-terrorists-

data.title: Bitcoin Investors Love The Possibility of US Government Investing In Crypto. For Trump, Lots of Talk, But No Action Yet.
data.description:
Trump signs an order to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. But the U. S. government is still not a buyer. Treasury Secretary says that might change. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/03/44521724/bitcoin-investors-love-the-possibility-of-us-government-investing-in-crypto-for-trump-lots?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: 3 reasons why Bitcoin price can’t take out the $90K resistance level
data.description:
Since reaching a weekly high of $88,752 on March 24, Bitcoin (BTC) price has formed a series of lower highs and lower lows in the 1-hour time frame chart. As the end of the week approaches, Bitcoin price has failed to break above the $88,000 resistance, reducing the chance for a $90,000 retest before the end of Q1. Bitcoin 1-hour chart
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/3-reasons-why-bitcoin-price-can-t-take-out-the-90-k-resistance-level?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trader Michaël van de Poppe Says Bull Market for Chainlink (LINK) Has Started, Updates Outlook on Bitcoin
data.description:
A widely followed crypto analyst says the decentralized oracle network Chainlink (LINK) may be at the start of a new uptrend. Michaël van de Poppe tells his 781,500 followers on the social media platform X that LINK is starting to break out against Bitcoin (LINK/BTC) on the weekly chart.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/27/trader-michael-van-de-poppe-says-bull-market-for-chainlink-link-has-started-updates-outlook-on-bitcoin/

data.title: Senator Cruz introduces companion bill to prohibit the Fed from issuing a CBDC
data.description:
US Senator Ted Cruz introduced a bill on March 26 to prohibit the Federal Reserve from issuing a central bank digital currency (CBDC). The “Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act,” would prohibit the Fed from offering certain products or services directly to American individuals, a key component of any CBDC. The Texas Republican’s bill can be considered a companion bill to Minnesota Republican Representative Tom Emmer’s anti-CBDC legislation, which was reintroduced on March 6. A companion bill is a piece of legislation that is similarly or identically worded to another bill, and introduced in the other chamber of Congress
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/senator-cruz-companion-bill-prohibit-fed-cbdc-digital-dollar?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether Extends USDT0 to Optimism’s Superchain—More Networks Coming Soon
data.description:
TL;DR USDT0, the omnichain version of Tether (USDT), expands its presence in Optimism’s Superchain network after its deployment on OP Mainnet. The integration includes Kraken’s Ink Layer 2 and aims to leverage the growing distribution network of the Superchain. USDT0 is backed by Tether but managed by Everdawn Labs, focusing on improving interoperability and scalability. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/tether-extends-usdt0-to-optimisms-superchain-more-networks-coming-soon/

data.title: Morpheus Unveils Decentralized AI Forge For Smart Agents, Simplifying Development
data.description:
Morpheus launches Forge, a tool repository for creating AI-powered agents without coding. $1M rewards given to developers, part of $10M incentive pool. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/03/44521589/morpheus-unveils-decentralized-ai-forge-for-smart-agents-simplifying-development?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Solana-based memecoin BONK has acquired Exchange Art
data.description:
BONK memecoin has acquired Exchange Art to merge crypto with exquisite fine art. Artist J. T. Liss will lead a new team to enhance the Exchange Art marketplace’s performance
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/solana-based-memecoin-bonk-has-acquired-exchange-art/

data.title: Bankman-Fried Moved to Oklahoma Transit Facility After Unauthorized Interview
data.description:
Sam Bankman-Fried moved to an Oklahoma transit facility after an unauthorized Tucker Carson interview. He maintains innocence despite a fraud conviction. Final prison location pending.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/investing/bankman-fried-moved-oklahoma-transit-facility-unauthorized-interview

data.title: Binance to List Four New Tokens Following Community Vote
data.description:
Binance announces new token listings on March 28, 2025, boosting market visibility.
source: https://coincu.com/328956-binance-community-vote-new-tokens
